problem.title: SuMa on KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)
problem.question: How does SuMa perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)?

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Use coarser surfels and a shorter history window for faster dense mapping.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer surfels and a longer history window for a denser dense-mapping solve.
